title: Le Creuset Cast Iron Pan – Wooden (Teak) Handle – Made in France
description:
Authentic Le Creuset cast iron pan with a beautiful teak wooden handle, combining durability with classic design. Perfect for everyday cooking thanks to the excellent heat retention of cast iron.
Details:
Brand: Le Creuset
Made in France
Material: Cast iron with teak wooden handle
Diameter: 26.5 cm
Height: 4 cm
Condition: Used, good condition
A high-quality, long-lasting pan that distributes heat evenly and is ideal for frying, sautéing, or searing. The wooden handle gives it a timeless look and comfortable grip.
